events.title: Iranian strikes target US Air Force assets in Saudi Arabia
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This is part of a pattern of asymmetric counterair operations by Iran against US and Israeli forces.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Iran implements nationwide internet blackout
events.desc: Following Israeli and American strikes, Iran's government deliberately dismantled its communications infrastructure, causing a 98% collapse in internet traffic. This blackout was imposed on the Iranian population.

events.title: US expends significant missile interceptor stockpile against Iranian threats
events.desc: During a recent conflict, the US military expended an estimated 100 to 150 upper-tier missile interceptors against Iranian missiles and drones, representing approximately 25% of its total stockpile in 12 days.

events.title: US and Iran hold ceasefire talks in Pakistan
events.desc: US and Iranian delegations are meeting in Islamabad, Pakistan, to negotiate an end to a six-week war. However, Iran has cast doubt on the talks, demanding commitments regarding Lebanon and sanctions.

events.title: Pakistan PM calls US-Iran talks 'make or break'
events.desc: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif described the upcoming US-Iran talks in Islamabad as a critical "make or break" moment for resolving the ongoing conflict.

events.title: Israeli strike kills Lebanese officers
events.desc: An Israeli air strike on a government building in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, resulted in the deaths of at least 13 officers, highlighting ongoing hostilities despite ceasefire efforts.

events.title: Hezbollah rocket attack damages ancient church
events.desc: Hezbollah launched a barrage of rockets towards northern Israel, causing damage to a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya.

events.title: Hungarian government passwords exposed online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, compromising security protocols across 12 of the country's 13 ministries.

events.title: US intelligence suggests China preparing weapons shipment to Iran
events.desc: US intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks, potentially routing shipments through third countries to conceal their origin.

events.title: Iran escalates A2/AD strategy in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Iran's strategy to control the Strait of Hormuz is described as crude but dangerous, posing a significant challenge to maritime freedom of navigation and increasing shipping costs.

events.title: US Navy Central Command HQ in Bahrain targeted by Houthi drone
events.desc: A Houthi drone attack targeted the US Navy's Fifth Fleet Headquarters in Bahrain. This incident underscores the ongoing regional instability and the reach of Houthi capabilities.

events.title: Lebanon and Israel to hold talks in US
events.desc: Lebanon and Israel are scheduled to hold direct talks in Washington to discuss a ceasefire and begin negotiations, following a period of intense conflict.

events.title: Israeli forces conduct air strikes in Beirut suburbs
events.desc: Israeli forces launched a significant wave of air strikes targeting the southern suburbs of Beirut and other areas in Lebanon, resulting in numerous casualties shortly after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

events.title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack
events.desc: A Palestinian individual was killed during an attack by Israeli settlers in an occupied West Bank village. This incident occurred amidst warnings of escalating "government-sponsored Jewish terrorism."

events.title: US scattering mines over Iranian village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over Kafari, a village near Shiraz, Iran, resulting in several fatalities according to Iranian media reports.
